reportMarkdown:
# 调研结论

## 一句话判断
已整理 3 个相邻方向，最接近的是 johnzfitch/raley-bot（20/100），目前更适合用来找灵感，不适合直接采用。

## 已整理的线索

### 1. johnzfitch/raley-bot（相邻参考） · ★ 1 · 更新 2026-06-15
- 关联度：20/100
- 得分原因：公开线索「A grocery shopping assistant that wraps a grocery store’s web API with intelligent p

...[truncated]...

Model Context Protocol).」与「Given a product link, the project reads the price and discount details from the page」方向相近，公开证据只支持较弱相邻关系，因此只作为相邻参考。
- 地址：https://github.com/johnzfitch/raley-bot

### 2. DoganayBalaban/PriceWise-AI（相邻参考） · ★ 2 · 更新 2026-05-17
- 关联度：20/100
- 得分原因：公开线索「Price tracking, forecasting, review sentiment analysis and RAG-powered Q&A platform for Turkish e-commerce」与「Given a product link, the project reads the price and discount details from the page」方向相近，公开证据只支持较弱相邻关系，因此只作为相邻参考。
- 地址：https://github.com/DoganayBalaban/PriceWise-AI

### 3. OrbisAPI/commerce-mcp（相邻参考） · ★ 2 · 更新 2026-06-08
- 关联度：20/100
- 得分原因：公开线索「500+ commerce & retail APIs for AI agents — Amazon, Walmart, product search, price t

...[truncated]...

call with USDC via x402.」与「Given a product link, the project reads the price and discount details from the page」方向相近，公开证据只支持较弱相邻关系，因此只作为相邻参考。
- 地址：https://github.com/OrbisAPI/commerce-mcp

## 本次消耗
- LLM Token（估算）：输入 56098，输出 677，合计 56775。

action:
README: Automated grocery shopping assistant with intelligent unit pricing, automatic coupon clipping, and an MCP server so your AI can argue with produce departments on your behalf. You tell Raley what you need. Raley finds the bes

...[truncated]...

ons, and manages your cart. All through a CLI or Claude Desktop.

README: You tell Raley what you need. Raley finds the best deal, calculates unit pricing across every bizarre measurement the grocery industry has invented (per oz, per lb, per "each" — what even is an "each"), clips relevant coupons, and manages your cart. All through a CLI or Claude Desktop.
